summary: Verified MaintenancePage.js refactor did NOT break existing functionality. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests PASSED against /api/maintenance (list/filter/create/start/complete) and /api/reports/maintenance/pdf (period + per-equipment). Frontend: end-to-end UI flow validated on https://maintenance-hub-284.preview.emergentagent.com - login → Maintenance page loads (data-testid maintenance-page) → 23 rows rendered → Reportes dropdown shows 3 period options (Ultimo dia / Ultima semana / Ultimo mes) → Nuevo Mantenimiento dialog opens with all expected fields (equipment-select, type-select, description-input, date-input) → Preventivo shows 'Campos Preventivo' by default → switching type to Correctivo shows 'Campos Correctivo' → Crear button persists record → Iniciar button transitions Pendiente → En Proceso → Finalizar dialog shows complete-notes-input and confirm-complete-btn → status changes to Finalizado with success toast. All refactor sub-components (MaintenanceFilters, MaintenanceTable, MaintenanceRow, MaintenanceForm, PreventiveFields, CorrectiveFields, CompleteDialog) render correctly and preserve all data-testid hooks.
critical_code_review_comments: MaintenancePage.js: MaintenanceTable filter logic only filters by searchQuery client-side; filterType/filterStatus are passed to backend via fetchData but also passed into MaintenanceTable unused (only used for empty-state text). Consider removing dead props to avoid confusion.

MaintenancePage.js line 492: useEffect deps only include filterStatus/filterType. The fetchData reference is stable but ESLint react-hooks/exhaustive-deps would warn. Safe as-is given current closure usage.

Backend maintenance_routes.py complete_maintenance: passes notes/solution/repair_time as QUERY params (line 123-125) while frontend sends them via axios params correctly. Works but POST body would be idiomatic for PUT update payloads; not a regression.
Backend maintenance_routes.py: '/maintenance-logs' alias (line 40-55) duplicates logic of GET /maintenance — DRY violation, consider delegating to the main handler.

MaintenanceRow: 'Download historial' icon button has NO data-testid; only the header-level report button has download-maintenance-report-btn. Add per-row data-testid like download-history-btn-{id} for future tests.
Dropdown items 'Ultimo dia/semana/mes' lack data-testid attributes - makes automated selection brittle (currently selectable only by text).
seed_data_creation: Created maintenance logs prefixed TEST_REFACTOR_PREV/CORR/START/COMP via backend tests and UI_TEST_REFACTOR_CORR_01 via playwright UI flow. These logs reference existing LAP-001 equipment and remain in DB (safe test data - prefixed for future cleanup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_maintenance_refactor.py (9 tests, all pass). Frontend Maintenance refactor verified end-to-end. No functional regressions from the 432->~700 LoC refactor. MaintenanceHistoryPdf endpoint is /api/reports/maintenance/{equipment_id}/pdf (NOT /api/reports/maintenance/history/{id}/pdf). For next iteration, consider adding data-testid attributes per the critical_code_review_comments.
rca of the issue: N/A — refactor preserved behavior. Backend API untouched; frontend sub-components wired identically to pre-refactor monolith.
